# Technology Stack

**Analysis Date:** 2026-06-27

## Languages

- **Python** — primary and only language used throughout the project
- Vietnamese used extensively in code comments, print statements, and dataset text

## Runtime

**Environment:**
- Python 3.9.6 (detected via local environment)
- CUDA-capable GPU recommended; falls back gracefully to CPU (`torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")` in `train.py:329`)

**Package Manager:**
- No `requirements.txt`, `setup.py`, or `pyproject.toml` detected in the repository
- Dependencies must be installed manually (implied by Kaggle notebook `result_ABSA_2` running `!python train.py`)

## Frameworks & Libraries

**Deep Learning:**
- `torch` (PyTorch) — core tensor computation, `nn.Module` hierarchy, `DataLoader`, optimizers, gradient clipping
- `torch.nn.functional` — cross-entropy, MSE loss, softmax activations
- `transformers` (Hugging Face) — `AutoModel`, `AutoTokenizer`, `get_linear_schedule_with_warmup`, logging verbosity control

**ML Utilities:**
- `scikit-learn` — `accuracy_score`, `f1_score` for evaluation metrics in `train.py:10`
- `tqdm` — progress bars for training/evaluation loops in `train.py:11`, `train.py:244`, `train.py:265`

**Configuration:**
- `pyyaml` — YAML config loading in `train.py:2`; all experiment configs are YAML files under `config/`

**Standard Library:**
- `json` — JSONL data reading/writing across `vocabulary.py`, `dataloader.py`, `clear_data.ipynb`
- `pathlib.Path` — path handling in `dataloader.py`, `vocabulary.py`
- `os` — directory creation, path existence checks in `train.py`
- `math` — scaling factor in `model/conditional_attn.py:11`
- `typing` — type hints throughout (`Dict`, `List`, `Union`, `Sequence`, `Tuple`, `Iterable`, `Optional`)

## ML/DL Frameworks

| Framework | Usage |
|-----------|-------|
| PyTorch `nn.Module` | All model components (`TargetedABSAModel`, `AttentionPooling`, `ConditionalAttention`, `GatedFusion`, `MLPHead`, `FocalLoss`) |
| Hugging Face `transformers` | Encoder backbone (`AutoModel.from_pretrained`), tokenizer (`AutoTokenizer`), LR scheduler |
| `torch.utils.data` | `Dataset` (subclassed as `ABSATargetedDataset`), `DataLoader` |
| `torch.optim.AdamW` | Optimizer with parameter-group split between encoder and classification heads |

## Data Processing

- **JSONL format** — each sample is a JSON line with `"id"`, `"data"` (review text), `"label"` (list of `[start, end, label_string]` annotations)
- **Text-pair tokenization** — review text paired with target span text; tokenized via `AutoTokenizer` with `padding="max_length"`, `truncation=True`, `max_length=128` (train) or configurable
- **Target mask construction** — reverse-scan sliding window over `input_ids` to locate target token subseqence (`vocabulary.py:_build_target_mask`)
- **Label encoding** — string labels normalized (uppercase, no spaces) then mapped to integer IDs via `Vocabulary` dictionaries
- **Class weight computation** — inverse-frequency weights computed over training set for imbalanced class handling

## Dev Tooling

- **Package manager:** None detected (no lockfile)
- **Python version:** 3.9.6 (local); Kaggle kernel used for cloud training (see `result_ABSA_2` notebook)
- **Jupyter Notebooks:** `clear_data.ipynb` (data preprocessing); `result_ABSA_2` (Kaggle training runner, saved as notebook JSON)
- **Notable config files:**
  - `config/base.yaml` — default training/data/model hyperparameters
  - `config/encoders.yaml` — encoder registry (PhoBERT-base/large, XLM-R base/large, ViDeBERTa)
  - `config/label_structures.yaml` — output head configurations
  - `config/attention.yaml` — attention variant definitions
  - `config/losses.yaml` — loss function registry
  - `config/experiments.yaml` — experiment run groups referencing the above configs
  - `reports/test_metrics.json` — persisted evaluation results

## Dependencies (Not tracked in requirements file — inferred from imports)

| Package | Inferred Version Constraint | Purpose |
|---------|----------------------------|---------|
| `torch` | ≥ 1.9 (MultiheadAttention `batch_first` param used) | Core DL framework |
| `transformers` | ≥ 4.x (AutoModel/AutoTokenizer) | Pretrained encoder backbone |
| `scikit-learn` | Any recent | Metric computation |
| `tqdm` | Any | Progress bars |
| `pyyaml` | Any | YAML config parsing |
